chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. M.A. No. 28 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 15.10.2025. None present for appellant. Same was the case on 18.02.2025, 21.03.2025 and thereafter the appellant appeared on 08.08.2025 and undertook to comply with the office objections within seven days’ time. Once again none is present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. Compliance of the order remains pending and the office objections are also unattended. It appears that the appellant has lost his interest in pursuing this appeal which is pending since 10.07.2023 without any progress. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
